based_on: A faithful remake of Gabriele Cirulli's classic 2048 sliding-tile puzzle — the canonical evergreen single-file browser game.
summary: The classic 2048 sliding-tile game: arrow-key and swipe controls, a 4x4 grid, smooth tile-merge animations, score and persistent best score (localStorage), and a win/lose overlay with restart and one-step undo.
sections: 4x4 grid on a rounded board frame
Same-number tiles merge into one (once per move)
Score + best score persisted in localStorage
Sliding tile movement, spawn-in and merge-pop animations
Win overlay with 'keep going', game-over overlay, and restart
New Game button, one-step Undo, and moves counter
setup_questions: What tile theme or color palette do you want?
